title: astro_artifacts_loaded
description: TwinBrain Web_Astro engine — emitted after CAP filter bizcity_twin_context_artifacts returns natal+transit passages from BizCoach_Pro_Astro_Transit_Resolver. PHASE-A C.3b (2026-06-04).

cap_source.description: Where transit data came from (per resolver). 'db'=cache hit, 'filter'=third-party pre_fetch, 'prefetch_scheduled'=cron queued + graceful natal-only block, 'natal_only'=no birth data, 'unavailable'=hard miss.

_degraded.description: Empty when fully OK. Known reasons: empty_query, astro_artifacts_empty, astro_cap_exception, astro_transit_unavailable, transit_pending, astro_birth_data_missing, transit_no_subject, transit_engine_missing, transit_build_context_missing.
